title: Tableau de bord démographique des régions du Sénégal

settings.query:
MATCH (r:Region {nom:'Dakar'})-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee {valeur:2023})
RETURN 'Hommes' AS Sexe, p.hommes AS Population
UNION
MATCH (r:Region {nom:'Dakar'})-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee {valeur:2023})
RETURN 'Femmes' AS Sexe, p.femmes AS Population

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (r:Region)-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee {valeur:2023})
RETURN p.totale AS Population_Max
ORDER BY Population_Max DESC
LIMIT 1

MATCH (r:Region)-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee {valeur:2023})
RETURN p.totale AS Population_Max, r.nom
ORDER BY Population_Max DESC
LIMIT 1

MATCH (r:Region)-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee {valeur:2023})
RETURN r.nom AS reg
ORDER BY reg DESC
LIMIT 1

settings.query:
MATCH (r:Region)-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee {valeur:2023})
RETURN p.totale AS Population_Max
ORDER BY Population_Max DESC
LIMIT 1

widgets.title: Tableau de quelques statistiques des régions

settings.query:
MATCH (r:Region)-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee {valeur:2023})
RETURN
distinct(r.nom) AS Region,
r.latitude AS Latitude,
r.longitude AS Longitude,
p.totale AS Population_Totale,
p.hommes AS Hommes,
p.femmes AS Femmes,
p.densite AS Densite,
p.taux_urbain AS Taux_Urbain,
p.taux_croissance AS Taux_Croissance
ORDER BY Population_Totale DESC

widgets.title: Répartition de la densité de population dans les régions

settings.query:
MATCH (r:Region)-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee {valeur:2023})
RETURN
r.nom AS region,
p.densite AS densite
ORDER BY densite DESC

widgets.title: Evolution de la population dans les régions 2002-2013-2023

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (r:Region)-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee)
WHERE a.valeur IN [2002, 2023]
RETURN
DISTINCT(r.nom) AS region,
a.valeur AS annee,
p.totale AS population
ORDER BY region, annee

MATCH (r:Region)-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee)
WHERE a.valeur IN [2002, 2013, 2023]
RETURN
DISTINCT(r.nom) AS region,
a.valeur AS annee,
p.totale AS population
ORDER BY region, annee

MATCH (r:Region)-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee)
WHERE a.valeur IN [2002, 2013, 2023]
RETURN
r.nom AS region,
a.valeur AS annee,
p.totale AS population
ORDER BY region, annee

MATCH (r:Region)-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee)
WHERE r.nom = "Dakar"
RETURN
DISTINCT(a.valeur) AS annee,
p.densite AS densite
ORDER BY annee

MATCH (r:Region)-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee)
WHERE r.nom = "Dakar"
RETURN
a.valeur AS annee,
p.densite AS densite
ORDER BY annee

settings.query:
MATCH (r:Region)-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee)
WHERE a.valeur IN [2002, 2013, 2023]
RETURN 
DISTINCT(r.nom) AS region,
a.valeur AS annee,
p.totale AS population
ORDER BY region, annee

widgets.title: Evolution de la population de Dakar de 02-13-23

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (r:Region {nom:"Dakar"})-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee)
WHERE a.valeur IN [2002, 2013, 2023]
RETURN
DISTINCT(a.valeur) AS annee,
p.totale AS population
ORDER BY annee

MATCH (r:Region {nom:"Dakar"})-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee)
WHERE a.valeur IN [2002, 2013, 2023]
RETURN
a.valeur AS annee,
p.totale AS population
ORDER BY annee

MATCH (r:Region)-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee)
WHERE p.densite IS NULL
RETURN DISTINCT(r.nom), a.valeur

MATCH (r:Region)-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee)
WHERE p.densite IS NULL
RETURN r.nom, a.valeur

settings.query:
MATCH (r:Region {nom:"Dakar"})-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee)
WHERE a.valeur IN [2002, 2013, 2023]
RETURN 
DISTINCT(a.valeur) AS annee,
p.totale AS population
ORDER BY annee

MATCH (r:Region)-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee {valeur:2023})
RETURN
distinct(r.nom) AS Region,
p.totale AS Population
ORDER BY Population DESC

MATCH (r:Region)-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee {valeur:2023})
RETURN
r.nom AS region,
p.hommes AS hommes,
p.femmes AS femmes

widgets.title: Répartition de la densité de population dans les régions (Copy)
Répartition de la population des régions du Sénégal

settings.query:
MATCH (r:Region)-[p:A_POPULATION]->(a:Annee {valeur:2023})
RETURN
r.nom AS region,
p.totale AS population
ORDER BY population DESC
